title: Agentica WID Payload (reflex/metric envelope)
description: Versioned contract for the wid_payload.json envelope produced by agentica_core.aggregate.write_payload (Python) and consumed by api/src/reflex-engine.ts (TypeScript). Validates the cross-language seam: the envelope identity (schema_version, timestamp) and the reflex entries the engine dispatches. Open by design (additionalProperties allowed) so the rich dashboard payload can evolve without breaking the seam — only the seam-critical invariants are enforced.

schema_version.description: Envelope version. Pinned so a Python/TS version skew fails fast on both sides instead of silently mis-parsing.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC time the payload was aggregated.

reflexes.description: Priority-ordered reflex/metric breaches the engine may dispatch.
